name: Mona Park Compton Crips
description: The Mona Park Compton Crips (MPCC) are primarily an African-American street gang located on the East Side in the unincorporated community of Willowbrook and Compton, California. Their neighborhood runs from 118th Street to 125th Street, between Mona Blvd and Wilmington Ave. Which, cover both sides of the Compton (Blue Line) Train Tracks, on Willowbrook Ave.
